info.title: A fatal error was encountered. The library 'libhostpolicy.so' required to execute the application was not found in '/usr/share/dotnet'.
info.description:
Failed to run as a self-contained app.
- The application was run as a self-contained app because '/tmp/inspectra-help-marada.utils-0.9.0-9ee59fb763b0478d97d9e8ffc6a7b042/tool/.store/marada.utils/0.9.0/marada.utils/0.9.0/tools/net8.0/any/Marada.Utils.runtimeconfig.json' was not found.
- If this should be a framework-dependent app, add the '/tmp/inspectra-help-marada.utils-0.9.0-9ee59fb763b0478d97d9e8ffc6a7b042/tool/.store/marada.utils/0.9.0/marada.utils/0.9.0/tools/net8.0/any/Marada.Utils.runtimeconfig.json' file and specify the appropriate framework.
